message:
style(ops): reformat iterator chains and match arms in alerts_slo and index_resources screens

Apply rustfmt-consistent formatting to method chains in alerts_slo.rs
(density_sparkline, build_alert_rows, build_slo_rows) and
index_resources.rs (percentile_strip_sparkline, build_rows). Also hoist
row_pulse binding above the Row::new call in index_resources for clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
